# Yuzer API v1.0 — Documentação Completa de Endpoints

> Gerado automaticamente a partir de `https://api.eagle.yuzer.com.br/api/docs`  
> Data: 2026-04-17T17:42:38.873Z

**Total de endpoints:** 369

**Servidor (Production):** `https://api.eagle.yuzer.com.br`

---

## Autenticação

- **HTTP Bearer:** `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- **API Key (Yuzer):** `Yuzer: <token>`

---

## Schemas de Erro Padrão (reutilizados em todos os endpoints)

```json
// 400 Bad Request
{ "additionalProperties": { "type": "string" } }

// 401 / 403 / 412
{
  "statusCode": "integer",
  "timestamp": "string (date-time)",
  "message": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "content": "object"
}
```

---

## Schema Padrão de Paginação (Page Response)

```json
{
  "totalElements": "integer (int64)",
  "totalPages": "integer (int32)",
  "pageable": {
    "unpaged": "boolean",
    "paged": "boolean",
    "pageNumber": "integer",
    "pageSize": "integer",
    "offset": "integer (int64)",
    "sort": { "unsorted": "boolean", "sorted": "boolean", "empty": "boolean" }
  },
  "numberOfElements": "integer",
  "size": "integer",
  "content": [...],
  "number": "integer",
  "sort": { "unsorted": "boolean", "sorted": "boolean", "empty": "boolean" },
  "first": "boolean",
  "last": "boolean",
  "empty": "boolean"
}
```

### POST `/api/brands/search`
> Search

**Request Body** (`application/json`, obrigatório):

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "from": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time"
    },
    "to": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time"
    },
    "addTaxInTotal": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "currency": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "page": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "perPage": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "q": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sort": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sortColumn": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "cashierId": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "status": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "ALL",
        "ENABLED",
        "DISABLED"
      ]
    },
    "idsNotIn": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "integer",
        "format": "int32"
      }
    },
    "cashierObjectId": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "timestamp": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "date": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

**Parâmetros:**

| Nome | Local | Obrigatório | Tipo |

| `forceDelete` | query | ❌ | boolean |

**`200`** — OK

**Parâmetros:**

| Nome | Local | Obrigatório | Tipo |

**Request Body** (`application/json`, obrigatório):

**`400`** — Bad Request

**`401`** — Unauthorized

**`403`** — Forbidden

**`412`** — Precondition Failed

---

### POST `/api/fiscal/v1/resendEmail/{nfceId}`
> Resend nfce email

**Parâmetros:**

| Nome | Local | Obrigatório | Tipo |
|------|-------|-------------|------|
| `nfceId` | path | ✅ | string |

**Request Body** (`application/json`, obrigatório):

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "emails": {
      "maxItems": 10,
      "minItems": 0,
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

**Respostas:**

**`200`** — OK

**`400`** — Bad Request

**`401`** — Unauthorized

**`403`** — Forbidden

**`412`** — Precondition Failed

---

### POST `/api/fiscal/v1/reprocessNotAuthorized`
> Reprocess not authorized V2

**Request Body** (`application/json`, obrigatório):

```json
{
  "required": [
    "company",
    "endDate",
    "startDate",
    "title"
  ],
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "id": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "title": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "startDate": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time"
    },
    "endDate": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time"
    },
    "company": {
      "required": [
        "id"
      ],
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

**Respostas:**

**`200`** — OK

**`400`** — Bad Request

**`401`** — Unauthorized

**`403`** — Forbidden

**`412`** — Precondition Failed

---

### POST `/api/fiscal/v1/processOrder/{orderId}`
> Test process nfce

**Parâmetros:**

| Nome | Local | Obrigatório | Tipo |
|------|-------|-------------|------|
| `orderId` | path | ✅ | string |

**Respostas:**

**`200`** — OK

**`400`** — Bad Request

**`401`** — Unauthorized

**`403`** — Forbidden

**`412`** — Precondition Failed

### POST `/api/fiscal/v1/cancel/{nfceId}`
> Cancel nfce

**Parâmetros:**

| Nome | Local | Obrigatório | Tipo |
|------|-------|-------------|------|
| `nfceId` | path | ✅ | string |

**Request Body** (`application/json`, obrigatório):

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "justificativa": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "companyId": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    }
  }
}
```

**Respostas:**

**`200`** — OK

**`400`** — Bad Request

**`401`** — Unauthorized

**`403`** — Forbidden

**`412`** — Precondition Failed

### POST `/api/fiscal/v1/backup/{companyId}`
> Backup fiscal

**Parâmetros:**

| Nome | Local | Obrigatório | Tipo |
|------|-------|-------------|------|
| `companyId` | path | ✅ | integer |

**Respostas:**

**`200`** — OK
```json
{
  "type": "array",
  "items": {
    "type": "object",
    "properties": {
      "month": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "xmls": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

**`400`** — Bad Request

**`401`** — Unauthorized

**`403`** — Forbidden

**`412`** — Precondition Failed

### POST `/api/customers`
**Request Body** (`application/json`, obrigatório):

```json
{
  "required": [
    "address",
    "cep",
    "city",
    "country",
    "district",
    "name",
    "nationality",
    "number",
    "phone",
    "state"
  ],
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "id": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "name": {
      "maxLength": 255,
      "minLength": 3,
      "type": "string"
    },
    "documents": {
      "uniqueItems": true,
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "number": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "type": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "CPF",
              "CNPJ",
              "PASSPORT",
              "DNI",
              "CUIT"
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "email": {
      "maxLength": 255,
      "minLength": 3,
      "type": "string"
    },
    "phone": {
      "maxLength": 255,
      "minLength": 3,
      "type": "string"
    },
    "address": {
      "maxLength": 255,
      "minLength": 3,
      "type": "string"
    },
    "complement": {
      "maxLength": 255,
      "minLength": 0,
      "type": "string"
    },
    "number": {
      "maxLength": 255,
      "minLength": 1,
      "type": "string"
    },
    "cep": {
      "maxLength": 255,
      "minLength": 3,
      "type": "string"
    },
    "nationality": {
      "required": [
        "id"
      ],
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      }
    },
    "country": {
      "required": [
        "id"
      ],
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      }
    },
    "state": {
      "required": [
        "id"
      ],
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      }
    },
    "city": {
      "required": [
        "id"
      ],
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      }
    },
    "district": {
      "maxLength": 255,
      "minLength": 3,
      "type": "string"
    },
    "image": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "status": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "profileStatus": {
      "type": "boolean"
    }
  }
}
```

### POST `/api/salesPanels/{salesPanelId}/seed`
> Generate salesPanel seed

**Parâmetros:**

| Nome | Local | Obrigatório | Tipo |
|------|-------|-------------|------|
| `salesPanelId` | path | ✅ | integer |

**Respostas:**

**`200`** — OK

**`400`** — Bad Request

**`401`** — Unauthorized

**`403`** — Forbidden

**`412`** — Precondition Failed

```json
{
  "type": "object",

    "from": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time"
    },
    "to": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time"
    },

      "type": "boolean"
    },

      "type": "string"
    },
    "page": {

      "format": "int32"

      "format": "int32"

    },
    "sort": {

      "enum": [

        "ENABLED",
        "DISABLED"
      ]

        "format": "int32"
      }

        "REPOSITORY"
      ]

}
```

```json
        "type": "string"

    }

}
```
